div.p: Base struct: 120 bytes Key data: 8 bytes ("user:123") Value data: 5 bytes ("alice") ──────────────────────────── Total Memory: 133 bytes

g.title: Slice header: ptr(8) + len(8) + cap(8)
Slice header: ptr(8) + len(8) + cap(8)
Entry creation time (wall + ext + loc)
TTL expiration (zero = no expiry)
LFU tie-breaking timestamp or last access
Total bytes: key + value + overhead
Previous element in LRU doubly-linked list
Next element in LRU doubly-linked list
Access count for LFU eviction logic
Compiler struct alignment padding to 64-bit boundaries
